prompts.header_prompt: You are the friendly in-store voice assistant at The Brew Corner. Answer naturally using ONLY provided context. The customer is on-site; never provide our address, phone, website, or directions. If info is missing, politely say you don't know and suggest asking counter staff.
prompts.footer_prompt: Provide a brief, natural spoken response based ONLY on the context. Include prices if mentioned. No address, contact info, markdown, lists, or citations.

documents.title: Store hours
documents.text:
This kiosk is inside The Brew Corner. Customers asking here are already in the store.

Store hours: Monday–Friday 6:30 AM – 8:00 PM; Saturday 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Sunday 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM. The espresso bar opens at 6:30 AM every day.

If the store is open now, staff at the counter can help with anything not covered here. The kiosk does not provide street address, phone numbers, or driving directions.

documents.title: Coffee and espresso menu
documents.text:
All espresso drinks use our house blend, Riverside Roast, or decaf Mountain Mist.

Hot drinks (12 oz): Drip coffee $2.75, Americano $3.25, Latte $4.50, Cappuccino $4.50, Mocha $5.00, Flat white $4.75, Cortado $3.95.

Iced drinks (16 oz): Iced latte $5.25, Iced mocha $5.75, Cold brew $4.50, Iced Americano $3.75.

Extra espresso shot $0.75. Oat milk, almond milk, or soy milk $0.60. Vanilla, caramel, or hazelnut syrup $0.50.

We do not offer whipped cream on hot drinks. Decaf is available for all espresso beverages.

documents.title: Tea, chai, and non-coffee drinks
documents.text:
Hot tea (12 oz): English breakfast, green sencha, chamomile, peppermint, or Earl Grey — $3.25 each. Refills on hot tea are $1.00.

Chai latte (12 oz) $4.75; iced chai (16 oz) $5.25.

Hot chocolate (12 oz) $4.25, made with whole milk. Iced matcha latte (16 oz) $5.50.

Fresh-squeezed orange juice (12 oz) $4.00, available until 11 AM daily.

Sparkling water (500 ml) $2.50; still water (500 ml) $2.00.

documents.title: Bakery and pastries
documents.text:
Baked fresh every morning by Riverside Oven Co.

Pastries: Butter croissant $3.50, chocolate croissant $4.00, blueberry muffin $3.75, banana nut muffin $3.75, cinnamon roll $4.25.

Savory: Egg and cheddar breakfast sandwich on brioche $6.50 ( served until 11 AM ). Turkey and Swiss panini $8.95. Grilled cheese $6.25.

Gluten-free almond flour brownie $4.50 ( kept in sealed container; ask staff ).

Day-old pastries are 50% off after 5 PM while supplies last.

documents.title: Grocery staples and mini-market items
documents.text:
The Brew Corner mini-market aisle stocks everyday essentials.

Dairy: Whole milk half-gallon $3.49, oat milk half-gallon $4.99, large eggs dozen $4.29, salted butter 8 oz $4.79.

Bread: Sourdough loaf $5.50, whole wheat loaf $4.95.

Snacks: Local honey 8 oz jar $9.50, mixed nuts 6 oz $6.25, granola bars 5-pack $5.99.

Pantry: Riverside Roast whole beans 12 oz $14.00, Riverside Roast ground 12 oz $13.00, paper filters 100-count $3.25.

We restock grocery items Tuesday and Friday mornings.

documents.title: Returns and refunds
documents.text:
Prepared drinks and food items cannot be returned once served unless there was a preparation error ( wrong drink, spoiled item ). Tell staff immediately and we will remake the item or refund the purchase.

Unopened packaged grocery items may be returned within 7 days with a receipt for a full refund to the original payment method.

Opened packaged goods, perishables, and sale items marked final sale are not eligible for return.

Without a receipt, we can offer store credit up to $20 at the manager's discretion.

For gift card balance questions, ask a staff member at the counter.

documents.title: Brew Corner Rewards loyalty program
documents.text:
Brew Corner Rewards is free to join at the counter or via the Brew Corner app.

Earn 1 point per $1 spent on drinks, food, and grocery items. Every 50 points earns a $5 reward toward any purchase.

Birthday reward: free pastry with any drink purchase during your birthday week ( show ID ).

Double points every Wednesday on drip coffee and tea.

Points expire after 12 months of account inactivity. Rewards cannot be combined with other coupons.

documents.title: Allergens and dietary information
documents.text:
Common allergens in our kitchen include milk, eggs, wheat, tree nuts, and soy. Cross-contact is possible; we are not an allergen-free facility.

Oat, almond, and soy milk are available for coffee drinks. None are certified gluten-free.

Vegan options: drip coffee, Americano, most teas, iced matcha with oat milk, grilled vegetable panini ( no cheese, ask staff ).

Gluten-free: only the packaged almond flour brownie is labeled gluten-free.

Nut-free: peppermint tea and plain drip coffee contain no added nuts, but cross-contact may occur.

Full ingredient binders are available at the counter on request.

documents.title: Checkout, payment, and Wi‑Fi
documents.text:
We accept cash, Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Brew Corner gift cards.

Minimum card purchase is $1.00. Tips are optional and can be added on the card terminal; baristas appreciate tips but they are never required.

Free guest Wi‑Fi network: BrewCorner-Guest. Password is posted at the counter and on the community board.

Restrooms are available for customers; please ask for the access code at checkout.

We do not offer cash back on debit purchases.

documents.title: Current seasonal specials
documents.text:
Spring 2026 specials at The Brew Corner ( valid through June 30, 2026 ):

Maple oat latte (12 oz hot or 16 oz iced) $5.50 — features local maple syrup.

Strawberry rhubarb muffin $4.25, available Fridays through Sundays.

Buy any 12 oz hot drink and get a butter croissant for $2.00 ( counter offer only, one per customer per visit ).

Riverside Roast whole bean bags: buy two 12 oz bags for $25 ( save $3 ).

Student discount: 10% off drinks Monday–Thursday before 3 PM with valid student ID.

documents.title: Kids menu
documents.text:
Kids drinks (10 oz): Steamed milk $2.00, hot chocolate $3.00, apple juice $2.50, small drip coffee is not sold to minors.

Kids snacks: Mini chocolate chip cookie $1.50, cheese stick $1.75, fruit cup $3.25.

Kids meal: Half grilled cheese with apple slices and a small milk or juice $5.95.

High chairs are available near the front window seating; ask staff to bring one to your table.

documents.title: Soups and salads
documents.text:
Soup of the day (12 oz cup) $4.95, (16 oz bowl) $6.50. Typical rotations: tomato basil, chicken noodle, roasted vegetable. Ask the counter for today's soup.

Side garden salad $4.25 — mixed greens, tomato, cucumber, vinaigrette on the side.

Caesar salad ( entree ) $8.50 — romaine, parmesan, croutons; add grilled chicken $3.00.

Quinoa harvest bowl $9.25 — quinoa, roasted squash, kale, lemon tahini dressing; vegan.

documents.title: Reusable mug and cup discount
documents.text:
Bring your own clean reusable cup and get $0.25 off any hot or iced bar drink.

Brew Corner branded tumblers (16 oz) $18.00 include a free drink the day of purchase.

We rinse cups briefly at the counter but cannot deep-clean customer vessels; lids must fit a standard 16 oz opening.

Discount does not apply to bottled or packaged drinks from the grocery aisle.

documents.title: Gift cards and retail merchandise
documents.text:
Gift cards are sold at the counter in any amount from $5 to $200. Gift cards do not expire and have no maintenance fee.

Merchandise: Brew Corner logo tee $22.00 ( S–XL ), enamel pin $8.00, tote bag $14.00, ceramic mug $16.00.

Seasonal candles (8 oz) $12.00 when in stock on the gift shelf near checkout.

Gift card balances can be checked at the counter only — the kiosk cannot look up balances.

documents.title: Catering and large orders
documents.text:
Coffee travelers (96 oz) $28.00 — serves about 12 cups; includes cups, lids, and sugar on the side. Order at least 24 hours ahead at the counter.

Pastry platters: 12 assorted pastries $42.00, 24-piece $78.00. Available for pickup only.

Sandwich platters for meetings ( serves 8 ) $65.00 — mixed turkey, cheese, and veggie wraps cut into halves.

We do not deliver. Pickup times are scheduled in 30-minute windows during open hours.

documents.title: Senior and military discounts
documents.text:
Senior discount: 10% off bar drinks and bakery items for customers age 65+ every day. Show ID at checkout.

Military and veteran discount: 10% off the entire purchase for active duty and veterans with ID.

Discounts cannot be combined with Brew Corner Rewards redemption or other coupons.

Discount applies in store only at the counter or kiosk checkout — not on catering pre-orders paid by invoice.

documents.title: Dairy-free and vegan guide
documents.text:
Plant milks for coffee: oat $0.60, almond $0.60, soy $0.60 — no extra charge for dairy-free on drip coffee.

Vegan food: quinoa harvest bowl, garden salad with vinaigrette, plain bagel ( confirm spread at counter ), almond flour brownie.

Not vegan: all croissants, most muffins, hot chocolate ( contains milk ), chai default mix ( ask for plant milk ).

Oat milk is stored separately but prepared on shared equipment; not certified allergen-free.

documents.title: Frozen and refrigerated take-home meals
documents.text:
Freezer case near aisle 2: lasagna tray ( serves 2 ) $11.99, vegetable curry $9.99, chicken pot pie $8.49.

Refrigerated case: fresh pasta packs $7.50, hummus tub $5.25, salsa $4.75.

All frozen and chilled items are sold as-is; check best-by dates before purchase.

We do not microwave customer purchases in store; reheating instructions are on each package.

documents.title: Fresh produce section
documents.text:
Produce is restocked Monday, Wednesday, and Friday mornings.

Typical items: bananas $0.69 each, avocados $1.99 each, apples $1.49 lb, salad kits $4.99, baby carrots $2.49 bag.

Seasonal berries vary in price; see shelf tags.

Produce is sold by weight or unit as marked. No returns on fresh produce once purchased.

documents.title: Cleaning and household supplies
documents.text:
Aisle 3 household basics: paper towels 2-roll $4.99, dish soap 18 oz $3.49, laundry detergent 32 oz $7.99.

Trash bags ( kitchen, 20-count ) $5.50, sponges 3-pack $3.25, all-purpose spray $4.25.

Toilet paper 4-pack $5.99 when in stock.

Household items are final sale once opened.

documents.title: Pet treats and supplies
documents.text:
Small pet endcap near checkout: dog biscuits 12 oz $6.99, cat treats 3 oz $4.50.

Portable water bowl $9.00, leash $14.00 ( limited colors ).

We allow leashed, well-behaved dogs in the grocery area only; pets are not permitted at indoor café tables.

Water bowls for dogs are available outside the front entrance.

documents.title: Magazines, cards, and sundries
documents.text:
Front rack: local weekly paper $2.00, national magazines $5.99–$8.99.

Greeting cards $3.50–$6.00, gift wrap rolls $4.00.

Sundries at checkout: hand sanitizer 2 oz $2.99, lip balm $3.25, phone charging cable $12.00 ( USB-C and Lightning ).

Magazines and cards are final sale.

documents.title: Seating, Wi‑Fi, and study space
documents.text:
Indoor seating: 14 tables inside, 6 seats at the community bar, 4 outdoor tables ( weather permitting ).

Outlets are available along the east wall and at two bar seats; extension cords are not permitted.

Free Wi‑Fi: network BrewCorner-Guest, password posted at the counter.

During busy hours ( 8–10 AM weekdays ) a 60-minute seat courtesy is appreciated when others are waiting.

documents.title: Families, strollers, and high chairs
documents.text:
Two high chairs and one booster seat are available; ask staff at the counter.

Strollers may be parked near the front coat rack; please do not block the aisle to the espresso bar.

Changing table is in the customer restroom; access code from checkout.

Kids must be supervised by an adult in the seating area at all times.

documents.title: Accessibility in the store
documents.text:
Step-free entry from the main door; automatic door opener on the right-hand entrance.

Aisles are minimum 36 inches wide; lower shelves hold popular grocery items.

This kiosk supports spoken questions via the mic button and text input on screen.

If you need help reaching a product, any staff member at the counter can assist.

documents.title: Lost and found
documents.text:
Items left in the store are held at the counter for 30 days.

Common items: umbrellas, water bottles, laptops, gloves.

To claim an item, describe it to a staff member; we may ask for details like color or brand.

The kiosk cannot log or track lost items — speak with the counter staff in person.

documents.title: Community board and local events
documents.text:
The community board near the exit posts flyers for local farmers markets, library events, and school fundraisers.

Brew Corner hosts a free acoustic music night on the first Friday of each month, 6–8 PM, in the outdoor seating area.

Bulletin posting is free for non-commercial neighborhood notices; ask the manager for a pin slot.

Event details change often — read the board in store or ask staff what is coming up this week.
